{#- Footer: copyright + last-updated + About + Edit-on-GitHub on the left, RSS feed icon (when ablog is loaded) on the right. Styled by static/css/footer.css. -#}
{%- if show_copyright %} © {{ copyright|e }} {%- endif %} {%- if last_updated %} Updated: {{ last_updated|e }} {%- endif %} About {%- if pagename not in ("search", "genindex", "py-modindex") %} Edit on GitHub {%- endif %}
{%- if ablog is defined %} {%- endif %}
